page_title: Spend Crypto in the Real World
page_description: The final cycle of financial sovereignty. Discover platforms to convert your cryptocurrencies into goods, gift cards, and precious metals in complete anonymity without the use of fiat banking intermediaries.

pro: No balance held by the provider
Pay the Proxy in BTC, they pay in Fiat

faq.domanda: Why is buying Gift Cards the preferred method for privacy-maximalists?
faq.risposta: Because it breaks the chain heuristic. By paying for a gift card on-chain (even better via Lightning), you get a barcode usable at the store checkout, without registering credit cards, IBANs, or accounts in your name.

faq.domanda: But doesn't the delivery driver know my address?
faq.risposta: Yes, if you use your real name. For maximum privacy, proxy shoppers like BuyForMe (or using a PO box under a different name) solve this problem by paying third parties in crypto to handle the Fiat purchase on your behalf, ensuring zero direct links to your wallet.

faq.domanda: Can I buy cars or houses directly with cryptocurrencies?
faq.risposta: Yes, the crypto-friendly real estate and automotive market is expanding. There are dealerships and real estate agencies (especially abroad, e.g., Dubai, Portugal) that accept direct payments in USDT or BTC without going through traditional bank transfers, although KYC regulations vary from country to country.

faq.domanda: How do I pay taxes if I buy physical goods with crypto?
faq.risposta: Caution: purchasing a physical good with cryptocurrencies constitutes a taxable event (a "realization"). In many jurisdictions, the difference between the initial purchase cost of the crypto and its value at the time you buy the good is subject to normal capital gains taxation.
